PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Jane Gordon for and with Peter Fields (Petitioner).

There being no objections, the Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jan-02-2008 Continued To Jan-16-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Jacqueline Perry appeared in court to object to granting of the petition. She stated that she was named as a co-executor in the Will. The matter was continued to 1/16 for her to file her objections. The clerk will notify counsel of the continuance.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
